name: Algorithmic procedure
mathematical_role: repeatable transformation of inputs into outputs
interpretation_warning: a working procedure still requires specification and validation
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation

name: Computability theory
mathematical_role: formalizes what can be computed by mechanical procedure
representation: Turing machines, lambda calculus, recursive functions
interpretation_warning: computability is not the same as practical feasibility
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation

name: Complexity theory
interpretation_warning: asymptotic analysis abstracts away many implementation details
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation

name: Simulation
mathematical_role: explores systems too complex for closed-form solution
interpretation_warning: simulation depends on model assumptions and numerical stability
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation

name: Computer algebra
interpretation_warning: symbolic simplification depends on domains and assumptions
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation

name: Proof assistant
mathematical_role: checks formal proof scripts against inference rules
interpretation_warning: verified proof of a statement does not validate the statement's social or modeling meaning
audit_note: computational mathematics should distinguish procedure, evidence, proof, model, and interpretation
